libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Preserve or add JVM/native-image test setup equivalent to `--add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED` when generating tests that exercise shaded Jackson `ClassUtil` behavior over `EnumSet`/`EnumMap` or other JDK collection internals. Use the relocated APIs under `shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.*`; do not add unshaded Jackson dependencies for normal coverage.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure appears to be a behavior/assertion mismatch after the embedded Jackson version changed, not a missing dependency or external service.

Adding external `com.fasterxml.jackson.*` dependencies would not exercise the relocated `shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.*` classes shipped by parquet-jackson and could mask the intended coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker image is needed; parquet-jackson is a shaded, dependency-reduced Jackson bundle, but meaningful coverage of some relocated Jackson internals needs a JDK module open.
